spots.name: Fogo de Chão (formerly Fazenda)
spots.notes: Upmarket churrasco rodizio at Exchange Flags, L2. The special-occasion one.

spots.name: Bem Brasil
spots.notes: All-you-can-eat rodizio on Hanover Street, L1. Lively, great for groups.

spots.name: Chico Brazil
spots.notes: Authentic Brazilian on Hanover Street — 5.0 on TripAdvisor, top-5 restaurant in the city.

spots.name: Fogo Brazil
spots.notes: Rodizio on Bold Street, L1 — the city's famous indie food street.

spots.name: Coco Brazil
spots.notes: Steakhouse with unlimited grilled meats + salad bar, Bold Street area.

spots.name: Copacabana
spots.notes: Brazilian BBQ near Queen Square, city centre.

spots.name: Capoeira For All CIC
spots.notes: Community capoeira at John Archer Hall, 68 Upper Hill St (L8). Kids, teens and adults — beginners welcome.

spots.name: Capoeira CDO North West (Mestre Parente)
spots.notes: Mestre Parente, 30+ years experience, teaching in Liverpool since 2002. Heald House, Heald Street, Garston (L19).
